description: We are looking for a Data Scientist with strong Python and SQL skills. You will build machine learning models using scikit-learn and PyTorch, and communicate findings to stakeholders.
Data Engineer role requiring expertise in Apache Spark, dbt (data build tool), and Snowflake. You will design ETL pipelines and work with Google BigQuery for cloud analytics.
We need an ML Engineer to deploy models using Docker and Kubernetes on AWS. Experience with MLOps, CI/CD pipelines, and FastAPI for model serving is essential.
Business Intelligence Analyst with Tableau and Power BI experience to build dashboards. You will use SQL and Microsoft Excel for data extraction and reporting.
NLP Engineer with deep learning experience using TensorFlow and Keras. You will work on large language models and prompt engineering for conversational AI products.
Data Analyst role requiring strong statistics and hypothesis testing skills. You will design A/B testing experiments and perform regression analysis to support product decisions.
Senior Data Scientist with experience in time series analysis and forecasting. Must be proficient in Python with pandas and numpy, and use Git for version control.
Cloud Data Engineer to build pipelines on Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud Platform. Experience with Apache Kafka and Apache Airflow for streaming and orchestration required.
Computer Vision Engineer with PyTorch expertise to build classification and object detection models. Feature engineering and model deployment experience preferred.
Data Scientist with R and Python skills for statistical modelling. The role involves clustering analysis, data modelling, and building LLM applications with LangChain and vector databases.
Analytics Engineer using dbt (data build tool), PostgreSQL, and data warehousing on Snowflake. Looker for dashboarding and strong stakeholder management skills expected.
Machine Learning platform engineer to maintain XGBoost and TensorFlow training infrastructure. Must know Docker, Kubernetes, and agile methodology. REST API design a plus.
